justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted "after lunch around 13" as after 13:00 and then correctly understood "around 9 am" as 09:00.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent reported unavailability and then offered to check a different day or a different time on the same day, which is a reasonable but not outstanding negotiation strategy.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent efficiently gathered all necessary information without any redundant questions or API calls.
justifications.customer_experience: The interaction was mostly smooth and professional, with the agent clearly communicating availability and booking details.
justifications.recovery_quality: The agent successfully recovered from the initial unavailability by offering to check other times on the same day, maintaining context throughout the conversation.
